projects.name: GRDN
projects.note: v1.11.2+3 — full repo-side audit done: the Xcode project is well-formed (automatic signing, one team, GoogleService-Info.plist tracked). No single repo smoking gun. Likeliest exit-65 cause is signing/provisioning for the restricted Family Controls entitlement across 5 bundle IDs, or an Xcode-version mismatch. Added a diagnostic ci_pre_xcodebuild.sh; pushed.
projects.nextStep: Two checks: (1) confirm the Xcode Cloud workflow is pinned to Xcode 26; (2) verify Family Controls + App Groups are enabled for all 5 GRDN bundle IDs in the developer portal. Then re-run. If it still fails, paste the first 'error:' + 'Code Sign'/'provisioning' lines from the archive step.

projects.name: SCANDALS
projects.note: v1.6.1 hardened paper detection + added a guard against garbage numbers. Honest finding: foot-on-paper can't be made reliable (small sheet covered by the foot, bright floor). The real fix is a capture change.
projects.nextStep: Decide: switch to placing the paper BESIDE the foot (both flat on the floor) — always a clean, fully-visible rectangle. Claude can make that code change.

projects.name: HD-LOVE
projects.note: Launch-polish done: demo screen replaced, toggle moved into a real Settings screen, matching reframed into Romantic/Friends/Networking tabs with tagged matches. UX review: the experience is built; real go-live still needs auth, photo upload, and a live candidate feed.
projects.nextStep: Decide whether Claude takes on the go-live backend next: authentication, photo upload, and a live candidate feed.

projects.name: irons-design

projects.name: WEATHER

projects.nextStep: Smoke-test the auto-capture flow in Expo Go on your iPhone.

projects.name: AI Voice Agent
projects.note: Foundation built — standalone project at ~/Documents/code/primal-agent. Build-order steps 1-10 + 12 are real running code (voice loop, agent brain, SMS/email, compliance, escalation). Type-checks and boots in mock mode. Dashboard UI + real gym adapter still to build.
projects.nextStep: Create a private GitHub repo + push; start the Twilio A2P 10DLC registration; work through docs/PROVISIONING.md.
